name: mouse_pseudogene
description: Mouse pseudogenes: ~14,000-18,000 annotated entries in GENCODE M33. Includes (a) processed pseudogenes (retrotransposed via L1 machinery; lack introns, often carry poly-A trails), (b) unprocessed/duplicated pseudogenes (have intron structure), and (c) unitary pseudogenes (lineage-specific gene losses). Coding-like sequence with premature stops or frameshifts; sequence identity to the parent gene 70-99%, generating mapping ambiguity vs. the functional paralog.
